evidence_notes: Actual repaired SVGs were read from pipeline/iconforge/assets/svg/owned_repair_batch62/ in this worktree.
Candidate day/dusk/night renders were read from pipeline/iconforge/out/standard_repair_batch54/renders and OpenCPN/source-variant references from pipeline/iconforge/out.

Each verdict used the asset id, name, semantic_brief, s57_structure, reference_providers, before/after SVG paths, before/after render paths where present, and the input required_change from owned_repair_batch62 plus source-table row metadata.
OpenCPN is the available provider witness for all nine HRBFAC10-HRBFAC18 rows in this source table; S-101 and AquaMap provider arrays are empty for this batch.
Passes are judge_pass_pending_final_approval only and grant zero final approvals.

selection.pass_semantics: pass-pending-human only; this artifact grants zero final approvals
selection.selection_note: Judged owned_repair_batch62 HRBFAC10-HRBFAC18 harbour facility repairs against row metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/S-52 conditions, OpenCPN provider references, repaired SVGs, before/after references, prior latest judge history, and available candidate/reference renders.

verdicts.expected: Default harbour facility must preserve the HRBFAC10 facility disk vocabulary and black cue treatment. S-57/S-52 conditions: none.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human: correct HRBFAC facility symbol class, facility cue vocabulary, and black/gray color treatment are present against the OpenCPN/source-table references. No final approval is granted.
verdicts.observed: After render is the default harbour-facility disk with the black central vertical facility cue and gray CHBRN area fill, matching the OpenCPN/reference vocabulary apart from generated stroke smoothness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: required_change_input:Replace with the default harbour-facility reference icon and correct color treatment.
